added.description: Text labels for Route and Remarks result fields.
An information dialog appears when the user changed the language.

updated.description: All text fields are now easy to see with a shadow.

fixed.description: The route and remarks do not show even if the user has pressed the Search button.
Uncontrolled Recursion vulnerability in Apache Commons Lang. Version 3.18.0 or later is required.
Some logging dependencies were not added to the classpath and pom.xml.

update.description: Entire route finder updated for more efficient and accurate results.
Changed the setting selection method from radio buttons to a dropdown menu for better usability.

fixed.description: It could not read route data because of columns are shifted in new Excel data.

changed.description: Settings has been moved to MenuBar option.
Excel file path field has been moved to settings dialog.

added.description: Origin and Destination airport swap button has been added.

fixed.description: The application does not save the Excel file path to the configuration file.
